description: Baseline: 75 structural diffs across 10 books. Martyr=0, 1984=0, ThreeBelow=3, HeatedRivalry=7, Elvis=6, ThroneOfGlass=5, SunriseReaping=8, Familiars=13, SecretsCrown=16, HungerGames=17

description: Fix </body> placement: single self-closing elements now have </body> on same line matching lxml serialization. Reduced from 75 to 71 structural diffs (-4).

asi.books_improved: HungerGames 17â†’16, Familiars 13â†’12, SunriseReaping 8â†’7, ThreeBelow 3â†’2, Elvis 6â†’5, HeatedRivalry 7â†’6, ThroneOfGlass 5â†’4
asi.hypothesis: Fix closing </body> placement for single self-closing HTML elements to match lxml compact serialization
asi.fix: In sectionXHTML, detect single self-closing HTML body content and put </body> on same line

description: Fix JXR image conversion: set correct MIME type (image/jxr) for JXR resources with empty mime field. parseResourceFragment was incorrectly setting image/jpeg, preventing JXRâ†’JPEG conversion. 71â†’60 structural diffs, 22â†’0 missing files.

asi.bug: parseResourceFragment set JXR mediaType to image/jpeg instead of image/jxr when mime was empty. This prevented the JXRâ†’JPEG conversion in buildResources from detecting JXR resources.
asi.fix: Set correct MIME type per format: jxrâ†’image/jxr, jpgâ†’image/jpeg, pngâ†’image/png
asi.impact: SecretsCrown: -11 structural (JXR refsâ†’JPG), 22 missingâ†’0 (JXR image files now exist as JPG)
asi.image_diffs_increase: 127â†’138 because JXR images now produce different JPEG encoding vs Calibre

description: Refine </body> placement: only compact for self-closing elements (ending '/>') and SVG. Non-self-closing single-line elements get standard newline before </body>. Fixes 1984 regression (7 diffsâ†’0).

asi.bug: Previous fix put </body> on same line for ALL single-line HTML, not just self-closing elements. This broke pages with <a>, <div>, etc.
asi.fix: Narrow condition: only self-closing elements (ending with '/>') or SVG properties get compact </body>. Non-self-closing elements get standard \n before </body>.
asi.impact: 1984: 7â†’0 (was incorrectly getting same-line </body>), but kept the image-only page fix for HungerGames/Familiars/etc

description: Fix promoted image body: convert -kfx-box-align to text-align and remove width. 53â†’17 structural diffs (-68%). HungerGames 17â†’1, Familiars 13â†’0, Elvis 5â†’0, SunriseReaping 1â†’0, ThreeBelow 1â†’0.

asi.hypothesis: Promoted image body inherits width:100% from container, preventing class split. Convert box-alignâ†’text-align and remove width from body to match Python's create_container behavior.
asi.key_insight: Python converts -kfx-box-align to text-align in create_container (yj_to_epub_content.py:1335-1336). Go's promoted body bypasses this. Also width must be removed from body because Python keeps it on child img, not on body.
attempted_approaches: Full non-heritable property filtering â†’ regressed Martyr by 54 diffs due to class ordering
Only box-align conversion â†’ didn't split classes because width still shared
Targeted: box-alignâ†’text-align + delete width â†’ correct, no regression

description: Fix promoted body inline text whitespace: sectionXHTML no leading \\n for plain text + BodyInlineText flag for non-heading \\n prefix. HeatedRivalry 7â†’3, total 17â†’13.

attempted_approaches: Adding \n to Root.Children â†’ normalizeHTMLWhitespace converts to
Modifying BodyHTML in renderStoryline â†’ overlay merge overwrites it
Adding \n prefix in processSection â†’ materializeRenderedSections recomputes BodyHTML
asi.hypothesis:
For promoted body inline text, Python's lxml serializes text directly after <body> (no leading 
). For headings, body.text = 'text' directly. For non-headings, body.text = '
text' (from <span> child element unwrapping). sectionXHTML must not add leading 
 for inline text, and non-heading inline text needs 
 prefix in BodyHTML.
asi.key_insight:
Two-part fix needed: (1) sectionXHTML omits leading for plain text, (2) non-heading promoted inline text gets prefix in materializeRenderedSections via BodyInlineText flag (not in Root.Children because normalizeHTMLWhitespace converts to
)
